title: SSC CGL 2026 Notification
qualification: Bachelor's degree in any discipline from a recognised university
summary: SSC has released the CGL 2026 notification for 17,727 Group B and C posts across central government departments. Graduates can apply online before 24 July 2026.
how_to_apply: Register on the official SSC portal with a valid email and mobile number.
Fill the CGL 2026 application form with your education and personal details.
Upload a recent photo and signature in the required format.
Pay the application fee online (where applicable) and submit the form.
Download and save the confirmation page for future reference.
selection_process: Tier 1 — Computer-Based Examination (objective: Reasoning, General Awareness, Quantitative Aptitude, English).
Tier 2 — Computer-Based Examination (Mathematical Abilities, Reasoning, English, Computer Knowledge).
Document Verification and final merit-based selection.

title: IBPS PO 2026 Recruitment
qualification: Graduate in any discipline with basic computer knowledge
summary: IBPS invites applications for 5,208 Probationary Officer posts in participating public sector banks. The online application window is open from 1 to 21 July 2026.
how_to_apply: Visit the official IBPS website and open the CRP PO/MT registration link.
Complete the registration and note your registration number and password.
Fill in academic, personal and category details accurately.
Upload photograph, signature, left thumb impression and a handwritten declaration.
Pay the fee and submit. Take a printout of the completed form.

title: RRB NTPC 2026 Vacancy
qualification: 12th pass / Graduate depending on the post applied for
summary: Indian Railways has notified 11,558 NTPC posts for graduates and 12th-pass candidates. Apply online through your regional RRB website before 2 July 2026.
how_to_apply: Find your regional RRB website from the official RRB portal.
Create a one-time registration and verify with OTP.
Choose your preferred posts and RRB region.
Upload scanned documents as per the size specifications.
Pay the examination fee and submit the application.
